popularStory.description:
Robert was captured at the battle of Dunbar in 1296, together with his brother Alexander and nephew Sir John Comyn The Red and they were afterwards imprisoned for
We a time.
On 10 February 1306, a mee …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Comyn於1261年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登時，他的父親Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway46歲，母親Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway35歲。他於大約1291年與Margaret Comyn在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1306年在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Comyn于1261年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登时，他的父亲Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway46岁，母亲Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway35岁。他于大约1291年与Margaret Comyn在苏格兰艾爾金爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1306年在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Comyn was born in 1261, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, was 46 and his mother, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, was 35. He married Margaret Comyn about 1291, in Elginshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1306, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Comyn est né en 1261, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Comyn environ 1291, à Elginshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1306, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Comyn 1261 in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway 46 und seine Mutter Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway 35. Er hat um 1291 in Elginshire, Scotland Margaret Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1306 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Comyn è nato il nel 1261 nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Comyn circa 1291, nel Elginshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1306, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Comynが1261年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで生まれた時，父Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Gallowayは46歳，母Marion Maclachlan Of Gallowayは35歳であった。約1291年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアでMargaret Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1306年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Comyn(이)가 1261년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1291년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 Margaret Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1306년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Comyn nasceu em 1261, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Comyn aproximadamente 1291, em Elginshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1306, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Comyn родился в 1261 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Comyn около 1291 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1306 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Comyn nació en 1261, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margaret Comyn aproximadamente 1291, en Elginshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1306, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 45 años.
